introSection:
This article is for a Jungle Mouse-style coaster located at Beihai Park in central Beijing, China.

As of writing, the only known documentation of this coaster is a photograph dated 1991. This ride had orange track and white supports.
fullText:
This article is for a Jungle Mouse-style coaster located at Beihai Park in central Beijing, China.

As of writing, the only known documentation of this coaster is a photograph dated 1991. This ride had orange track and white supports.
